title: Create: Chocolate Fountain
description: Adds a configurable Chocolate Fountain that automatically feeds nearby players
body:
This addon for the **Create Mod** introduces a **Chocolate Fountain** that automatically feeds nearby players with chocolate, keeping them from going hungry while they build and explore. The fountain’s range and other settings can be adjusted to fit your needs, making it a useful and customizable addition to any world.


<details>
<summary>Features</summary>

### Chocolate Fountain Block
- **Automatic Feeding**: Continuously feeds nearby players with chocolate, restoring Hunger
- **Highly Configurable**: Config for aspects like range, consumption rate, and feeding interval
- **Supported Fluids**:
    - Chocolate for feeding players
    - Honey for feeding players and calming nearby bees
    - Water for aesthetic purposes


### Bee Calming Effect
When filled with honey, the fountain calms nearby bees, preventing them from becoming aggressive when harvesting beehives and getting attacked.

### Mod Compatibility
- [**Thirst Was Taken**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/thirst-was-taken): Water Fountains hydrate players automatically while within range 
- [**Create: Confectionery**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-confectionery): Full compatibility with modded chocolate variants

</details>


Also available on [**CurseForge**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-chocolate-fountain).
